What We Do

End-to-End Authorization
& RCM Support

Purpose-built services for specialty practices and imaging centers that need reliable PA management without the overhead.

📋

Prior Authorization Management

Complete PA lifecycle management from submission to approval — across many major payers and specialties.

PA submissions to Aetna, BCBS, UHC, Medicaid & more Real-time payer follow-ups & status tracking Peer-to-peer review coordination Payer-specific documentation preparation
🚫

Denial Management & Appeals

Structured denial review and appeal documentation to recover revenue and reduce future denial rates.

Root cause analysis on denied PAs Clinical appeal letter drafting Escalation & overturn tracking Pattern analysis to prevent future denials
✅

Eligibility Verification

Accurate insurance coverage checks before appointments to prevent downstream delays and claim rejections.

Real-time eligibility checks via Availity Benefits & copay verification Pre-authorization requirement screening Same-day turnaround available
🔄

RCM Team Support

Dedicated remote support for RCM teams managing high PA volume across multiple sites or specialties.

Works within your existing EHR & workflow Kareo, Tebra, AdvancedMD compatible Weekly performance & approval reports Scalable — from 1 site to 30+ locations
Why MedSyncore

Your Team Deserves
Better Than Burnout

We work quietly in the background — so your billing team can focus on what actually moves the needle.

01

Healthcare-Focused Expertise

Deep knowledge of payer-specific PA criteria, documentation standards, and authorization pathways across many major US payers.

02

Consistent, Proactive Follow-Up

Structured tracking ensures every PA is followed up by Day 3 — not Day 7. Faster approvals, fewer delays.

03

Zero Disruption to Your Workflow

We integrate with your existing EHR, billing platform, and team processes. No new systems. No retraining required.

04

Fully Remote & HIPAA Compliant

US-standard communication, BAA ready, and fully compliant workflows for secure handling of all PHI data.

How It Works

Up & Running in 48 Hours

Simple, structured onboarding so we can start supporting your team without disruption.

01

Discovery Call

15-minute call to understand your PA volume, specialties, payer mix, and current challenges.

02

Sign BAA & NDA

All compliance documents signed before any patient data is shared or work begins.

03

Workflow Integration

We align with your existing EHR, portals, and team processes. Zero disruption to your setup.

04

PA Management Begins

Submissions, follow-ups, and denial management handled daily with weekly reporting to your team.
